nasb.text: Behold, the nations are like a drop from a bucket, And are regarded as a speck of dust on the scales; Behold, He lifts up the islands like fine dust.

esv.text: Behold, the nations are like a drop from a bucket, and are accounted as the dust on the scales; behold, he takes up the coastlands like fine dust.

cnv.text: 看哪！萬國都像水桶裡的一滴， 又被看作天平上的微塵。 看哪！他舉起眾海島，好像微細之物。

ccb.text: 看啊，列国就像水桶中的一滴水， 又如天平上的尘埃。 祂举起众海岛，好像捧起微尘。

csbs.text: 看哪！列国就像桶里的一滴水， 又算如天平上的灰尘； 看哪！他称量众海岛，就像称量微尘。
